name: Willfar Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Willfar Information Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells utility measurement equipment. The company offers meter data management terminals, smart water meters, smart gas meters, electric power distribution indicator, and electrical energy efficiency management, as well as energy saving products, such as solar powered lights. Willfar Information Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Changsha, China. Willfar Information Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Wasion Group Holdings.
